author: y4rr
content: Plan: Phase C.3 of real-artifact-driven development. Pin DataLoader batches from torch.utils.data for 5 configs (sequential, sequential_droplast, shuffled_seeded, shuffled_droplast, batch_size_3) using a 10-item fixed dict dataset. Build rust example (dataloader_iterate_dump.rs) that loads the same data + replicates config. Use Option B: SET-equality for shuffled configs (rust PRNG != torch PRNG), ORDER-equality for sequential. Comparison harness scripts/verify_dataloader_inference.py runs cargo build + cargo run per config, compares batches. Cargo test wrapper conformance_dataloader_iteration.rs (#[ignore]-gated). Upload to ferrotorch/dataloader-batches-v1.
